subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken and caused all things to speak forth that there is no God but Him, the Single, the One, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق و انطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Manifestation of God as sun, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
